title: oenothera subacaulis
intro: Oenothera subacaulis, also known as western evening primrose, is a perennial plant species native to North America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects due to the presence of essential fatty acids, particularly gamma-linolenic acid (GLA). The health benefits of Oenothera subacaulis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats, as well as its ability to soothe skin conditions like eczema and acne. Oenothera subacaulis can be prepared as an herbal tea, oil, or capsule supplement, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
